# SGH Voice

> AI-powered voice input tool for macOS, iOS, and Android. Trilingual (Japanese / Traditional Chinese / English) speech recognition with on-device processing options. BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) model — users supply their own API keys to AI providers; the app itself is free.

## Product
- macOS app (Apple Silicon + Intel)
- iOS app (iPhone / iPad)
- Android app (Google Play in review)
- Open source: https://github.com/linchichuan/sgh-voice

## Key Features
- Trilingual mixed-language recognition (zh-TW / ja / en) without manual language switching
- Optional medical-domain mode for healthcare professionals, MRs, CRAs, researchers (prescription drug names, diagnostic terms, biotech vocabulary)
- Local-first AI: MediaTek Breeze-ASR-25 model runs on-device on Apple Silicon (3.5× faster than Whisper-turbo, 0.8GB 4-bit quantized)
- Hybrid mode: short utterances → local AI, long utterances → cloud AI for cost optimization
- Multiple LLM provider support: Ollama, Groq, Claude, OpenAI, OpenRouter (with automatic failover)
- Custom dictionary for proper nouns and domain-specific terminology
- Voiceprint verification: filters background voices and ambient noise
- Android IME (works as keyboard in any app)

## Privacy Stance
- All API keys stored encrypted on-device (AES-256, EncryptedSharedPreferences)
- No audio data sent to or stored on Shingihou servers
- Audio sent to user-configured AI provider (OpenAI / Anthropic / Groq) per their respective privacy policies
- Custom dictionary stored locally only

## Pricing
- Free plan: full app functionality, BYOK (user pays AI providers directly)
- Pro plan (future): server-provided API keys, reasonable-use cap

## Company
- Shingihou Co., Ltd. (新義豊株式会社) — Fukuoka, Japan
- Founded 2015
- Cross-border medical innovation and intelligent automation
- Contact: info@shingihou.com
